# Change history — pe-gra-context-information-create-update.prompt

## v2.0.0 — 2026-04-28

Renamed from context-file-create-update. Extended with multi-file domain support, structural assessment, authoritative source URLs, context-information naming alignment

## v1.1.0 — 2026-01-24T00:00:00Z

Added source classification (Primary/Secondary/Tertiary/Exclude)

## v1.1.0 — 2026-01-24T00:00:00Z

Added prioritization criteria (Relevance, Authority, Recency, Impact, Efficiency)
